recommendations.title: Eagle vs Shark

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: All About Lily Chou-Chou
recommendations.overview: Charts the troubled teenage years of students Yūichi Hasumi and Shūsuke Hoshino, exploring the shifting and complex power dynamics of their relationship against the backdrop of Yūichi's love for the dreamy and abstract music of pop star Lily Chou-Cho

recommendations.title: Bob Trevino Likes It
recommendations.overview: Lily Trevino unexpectedly befriends an online stranger who shares her self-centered father’s name. This new Bob Trevino’s support could transform her life.

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: The Missing
